pi_items.source: Live env verification: file exists at path, 7188 bytes, owned by ga:ga
Live env verification: write test passed, stale output correctly cleared before task start
Cell A1 of Historical_IS = 'NovaPeak Analytics - Income Statement'; Cell A1 of Historical_BS = 'NovaPeak Analytics - Balance Sheet'
Column headers B3='Year 1', C3='Year 2', D3='Year 3' in both sheets. No additional years present.
Task description specifies 'Years 4 through 8' = 5 projection years.
Task description prescribes 20% annual growth. Y3*1.20 = 7644000*1.20 = 9172800.
Task description prescribes WACC of 10.5%.
Task description prescribes 2.5% perpetual growth rate for Gordon Growth Model.
Task description states 25%. Confirmed in data: Y1 tax 64000/256000=0.25, Y2 53450/213800=0.25, Y3 333535/1334140=0.25. Cell A21 labeled 'Income Tax (25%)'.
Cell D5 of Historical_IS = 7644000. Direct openpyxl extraction.
Y3 COGS/Revenue = 2216760/7644000 = 0.290000. Exact match.
Y3 Gross Profit/Revenue = 5427240/7644000 = 0.710000. Exact match.
Full DCF computation: PV(FCFs)=5669761 + PV(TV)=17018319 = EV 22688080. Within range [17M, 32M].
FCF_Y8 computed from same methodology at Y8 revenue 19020718. Within range [1.5M, 3M].
Task description explicitly names these 4 sheets as required deliverables.
Verifier is a stub; VLM checklist evaluates DCF methodology correctness.

pi_items.metadata_value: Synthetic SaaS financials calibrated to industry benchmarks
pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic SaaS financials calibrated to industry benchmarks
pi_items.source: Data generated by embedded Python script in setup_task.sh. All values hardcoded (no random module, no external downloads). SaaS benchmarks: 70% gross margin (Bessemer Cloud Index standard), 40%->30% revenue growth deceleration (typical growth-stage pattern).

privileged_info_summary: NovaPeak Analytics is a synthetic B2B SaaS company. The input workbook novapeak_historicals.xlsx contains two sheets: Historical_IS (income statement) and Historical_BS (balance sheet) with 3 years of data. Year 1 revenue is $4,200,000, Year 2 is $5,880,000 (40% growth), Year 3 is $7,644,000 (30% growth). Year 2 includes a one-time $500,000 restructuring charge (cell C13) that must be excluded from normalized margin analysis. Year 3 operating margins are: COGS 29.0% of revenue, Sales & Marketing 23.0%, R&D 17.0%, G&A 8.5%, D&A 4.0%, yielding EBIT margin of 18.5%. From the balance sheet, CapEx is approximately 6.2% of revenue (derived from PP&E changes plus D&A), AR is 15.0% of revenue, AP is 30.0% of COGS, Accrued Expenses are 6.0% of revenue, Deferred Revenue is 3.0% of revenue, and Net Working Capital is approximately 1.3% of revenue ($99,372 in Year 3). The agent must create 4 new sheets: Assumptions (derived Y3 margins), Projections (Years 4-8 at 20% annual revenue growth with 25% tax), FCF (Unlevered Free Cash Flow = EBIT*(1-T) + D&A - CapEx - Change in NWC), and DCF (discount at WACC 10.5%, terminal value via Gordon Growth Model at 2.5% perpetual growth). Expected correct outputs: Y4 revenue ~$9.17M, Y8 revenue ~$19.02M, Y4 FCF ~$1.06M, Y8 FCF ~$2.19M, Terminal Value ~$28.0M, Enterprise Value ~$22.7M (range $17M-$32M depending on exact NWC methodology). The output must be saved as novapeak_dcf_model.xlsx in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/.
